feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: When SAC using Live Data Model that from HANA CLOUD notice Not authorized
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud  SAP HANA Cloud 

Hello,

I have created a Live Data Model. However, when I attempt to use it in a story, I receive an error message stating that I am not authorized. What steps should I take to resolve this issue? Is there anything specific I need to do within the HANA Cloud ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Calculate Current Month, Last year same month, Previous Month, YTD, for [Cross Calculation] on SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

  I am facing a requirement where I need to calculate Input Month, Last year Input month, Previous Month, YTD of income statement figures(SAP COPA Data) all on the same report using SAC(as below), the source data is from Datasphere.

 Cross Calculation is used

 

User will specify an input [Year/Month] at run-time. 

Please share your experiences on how to achieve this, thanks a lot !!!

＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝

Q2: We have to calculate the weighting for each line, is that possible ?

entry.title: SAP Integrated Financial Planning export job overwrite between two model
entry.content: We are using IFP from content and created export job on Profitability and OPEX model. Data sit in ACDOCP table in S/4 but even though we put a filter on FPA1 for their respective node ( 17 for Profitability and 18 for OPEX) data overwrite each other. Please help us in resolving this issue.

entry.title: Acquired model variables do not filter data
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm struggling to understand the point of model variables as they don't filter the data in an optimized SAC story +
when scheduling/bursting a story - the variable value also doesn't filter the story.

As an example using the planned events sample model I created a variable on City to prompt for a single City value.
It doesn't filter the story at all (yep I've checked the story table settings to for story vs widget variable options)
Scheduling the story and selecting the 'prompt' option to burst the story for different recipients also does nothing.

entry.title: Date Filtering
entry.content:
Hello dear community,

I am using two restricted key figures. One key figure is controlled via a Date Input Control for filtering a specific date, and the second key figure is controlled via a Calculation Input Control for filtering another specific date. To my knowledge, it is not possible to use two Date Input Controls in one story. Now, I have a chart (Numeric Point) that shows me the value for the first date and a variance deviation to the second date. The requirement is: The user should have the possibility to select both dates on all pages of the dashboard. However, a Calculation Input Control cannot be copied to other pages. How could I work around this problem? I would prefer not to create new Calculation Input Controls on each page and define new key figures for each page.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Is it possible to create Threshold based on the Dimension values as text instead of numbers?
entry.content: Our table does not have numerical values but a set of 8 text statuses. and we wanted to dynamically colour code the cells when new data was updated instead of manually performing the operation. Is there a way to do so?

entry.title: How to activate 2LIS_03_BF in RSA5
entry.content:
Hello experts in SAP , Today have a one problem.

The detail is that I need to activate the stock extractor called 2LIS_03_BF for some extractions that I perform through Azure. I try to enter the RSA5 transaction and proceed to find the extractor and activate the source, but I do not get any change. This is in the development environment. I attach a photo of how it shows its status.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Invalid Data Entry on Average
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I've configured the following settings for an account:

For the exception aggregation dimension, I selected all the dimensions in the model except for the date.

Now, I've set the Zero Values for the displayed account and entered a value:

I entered the value 12. So far so good.

But when I look at a more detailed level, I see the following values:

This is also on the lowest level, as you can see:

This isn't correct because I expected to see the value 12. What could be causing this issue?

Does someone has an idea?

Kind regards,

Ismail

 

@N1kh1l

entry.title: Create Alternate GL Hierarchies in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
I have been asked by team members to create some alternate hierarchies within our GL Account dimension.  For example, let's say we have a hierarchy node that includes GL Accounts 100001, 100002, 100003.  Can I create an alternate node that includes just 100001 and 100002 and excludes 100003?  For the time being I have created an alternate hierarchy that sits next to our standard hierarchy (see below) but it would be much more convenient if I could do it all within the same hierarchy so the teams didn't have to switch hierarchies when reporting or looking at data.

Within what below is called "Account Hierarchy" I can create the node that is needed but I can't duplicate where the base GL Accounts roll up to.  This was easy to do in BPC and wanted to see if it was possible in SAP Analytics Cloud?

entry.title: Not able to rotate the line from Shapes
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a simple question, How to rotate the line which we get in the shapes while creating a story. Currently it's a horizontal line and I want to rotate it to a vertical line.

regards

Vish

entry.title: Data Upload Starter Missing Clean/Replace Settings??
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have been testing out the new "data upload" starter widget which can be added to stories. While this is in theory a great addition (as it can help avoid users accidentally clearing out the entire data model is the wrong setting is chosen, and love the ability for users to revert/publish!) it seems to be missing to very key settings (clean/replace version, and more importantly clean/replace subset of data). 

For most clients who use the file upload method, they need to ensure data debris is cleared out prior to uploading a new set of data. The "clean" options allow this to be automatically done, although there is a high risk of users using the "clean version" option and clearing out all of the data in the model, hence why this new feature was so long awaited.

I've tested out whether a data action could be embedded into a multi-action, but this doesn't seem to be possible at present to choose a file upload template in the "data import" step.

Therefore, the only option for my clients at present is to have 2 steps. 1) new data action where they can pick which areas to clear and then 2) data upload step. The "clear" data action in this method could be open to mistakes by the user by clearing too much/too little (whereas the clean/replace subset used to automatically handle this). This therefore feels like one step forwards and one step backwards with this new functionality.

Does anyone know of a solution to this that I may have missed?

If not, I've submitted an enhancement request - please vote if you would also like to see these two settings added to the new file upload widget process:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/329138

Thanks

David

entry.title: SAC Lookup-Table - IF Statement
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am currently struggling with a rather unusual problem in SAC. In SAC we are using various data actions to calculate price points of specific articles. This working out very well. Now the question is: If this price point lies between a specific range, I would like to assign the property of the range. See the following example data sets from excel:

Dataset A:

ArticlePrice
A10
B15
C25

Dataset B:

Start RangeEnd RangeAssignment
05Low Price
512Mid Price
1220High Price
20100

Exclusive Price

Now in SAC I have been able to calculate the prices already via data action. Is there anyway to assign the property of the ranges to Dataset A.

One way would be to not create Dataset B, but instead have the range assignments in a if statement in Data Action of Datamodel A. But this is not feasible for us, as this assignment is used in several places and consists of over 50 lines of ranges. 

The final outcome should be like:

ArticlePriceAssignment
A10Mid Price
B15High Price
C25Exclusive Price

 

Do you have any ideas?

 

Thank you and best

entry.title: Unable to activate Advance trial of SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

I couldn't get access to the import file in the model of my basic trial version of SAC. So I won't get the Advanced trial version of SAC to use Modeler to analyze my Excel data, but when I register myself to the advanced trial web page, showing that there is a "technical Error try again later" from yesterday.

Please help me with this.

@SAPSupport1 @SAPSUPPORT2

entry.title: Showing the Currency type and rates in a SAC Story
entry.content:
Hey, 

Is it possible to display the currency rates table within a story for a user who cannot access the modeler?
The user needs to know the rates for planning purposes. Can I include a rate table, based on the currency table, in a story?

Thanks

entry.title: I want to set dimension filter of story with current year and fixed months splicing，how to write？
entry.content:
the code is not working

var date = new Date().getFullYear();
console.log(date);
var month ={
'Mar':'03',
'Apr':'04',
};
console.log(month);
var YearMar = date.toString() + month.Mar;

var YearApr = date.toString() + month.Apr;
console.log(YearMar);
var fullDate = "[Date].[FYQP].&[" + YearMar+"," + YearApr+"]";

Table_4.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Date",fullDate);

entry.title: Just Ask with datasphere model
entry.content:
Does SAC Just Ask support datasphere analytical model built using remote table? It doesnt work when i tried. Please clairy.

*** Update

Sorry for the confusion, it supports live datasphere model but it takes a long time to display the dropdown window that allows you to select model objects (dimensions/measures) at least when you using the model for the first time. As it was taking very long time i thought it does not support live model. But lot of features like create index/define synonyms/rules are not yet supported. Also I see nothing is planned in the near future for live models in the SAP roadmap. Without the above features there is no use of SAP claiming Just Ask supports live models. With the current limitations on live models we cant even suggest the clients to use it.

entry.title: Looking for the best way to calculate inflation
entry.content:
I am working on a project where a forecast is calculated via a data action, this forecast value should now be part of the planning. The planning looks like this, for example:

I have a value on an account "Acc_1", this value is on the source "Forecast". Now I want to enter a value on the same account "Acc_1", but this value should be on source "Adjustment". A % value is entered on
 the account "Acc_2", this is on the source "Inflation". 

I want to write a DataAction that calculates the following:

Acc_1(Forecast) = Acc_1(Forecast) + (Acc_1(Forecast) * Acc_2(Inflation)) + Acc_1(Adjustment).

Or would it be a better way to create new accounts that have the respective ending like "_inflation".
Without including the Source?

One consideration was to create new accounts and work with account formulas. To do this, I would have created new accounts, provided them with the extension _x and written the formula in Acc_1_Forecast that calculates everything. But since a data action is supposed to calculate Acc_1_Forecast, I can't write a formula here.

So I'm looking for the best way to solve this problem.

entry.title: How can be select always last member value in input control by default in sac
entry.content:
Hi
How can be select always last member value in input control by default in sac
In the image below, the last value is June 21, 2024. If June 22, 2024, arrives, then the input filter should change from June 21, 2024, to June 22, 2024."

Regards
Thayu

entry.title: Single selection in hierarchal input filter - SAC
entry.content:
Hey, 
I'm pretty sure I had this possibility in the past, and I can't find the way now - maybe It's a parameter/preferences issue.

The project's dimension is divided in 2 main groups "CAPEX" & "R&D".

In a "classic" story I've inserted an input control to filter my CAPEX projects.

I want the page to be filtered on only one-member, single selection, without losing the hierarchy structure (I can't choose "flat" because I need the CAPEX selection only).

However If I choose "single selection" the group "CAPEX" appears but not its members (meaning that it's not single, on the contrary, all the members are selected)

See below: 

How can I change it?
Thanks
Deb

entry.title: Datasphere model metadata in Just Ask
entry.content: We are trying to consume Datasphere analytical live model in Just Ask. After adding the live model by selecting "Add another model to search", it takes long time to display the metadata (fields/objects) of the model in the form a drop down window (refer pic1). Client cant wait such long time for the metadata (refer pic2) to show up. Is there any way to speed up for the metadata to be displayed. Any thing to be done in datasphere or any setting or option i am missing out in datasphere?
